api.organizations.errors.domain_scoped_f.text: Domain-scoped members cannot perform this action

api.organizations.errors.organization_no.context: Returned when an organization extid cannot be resolved

api.organizations.errors.organization_ow.text: Only organization owner can perform this action
api.organizations.errors.organization_ow.context: Returned when a non-owner attempts an owner-only operation

api.organizations.errors.organization_me.text: You must be an organization member to perform this action
api.organizations.errors.organization_me.context: Returned when a non-member attempts a member-only operation

api.organizations.errors.organization_ad.text: Only organization owners and admins can perform this action
api.organizations.errors.organization_ad.context: Generic fallback for verify_organization_admin when callers don't pass a per-action key

api.organizations.errors.extid_required.context: Returned when the organization extid path parameter is missing

api.organizations.errors.display_name_re.context: Returned when creating an organization without a display name

api.organizations.errors.display_name_to.text: Organization name must be less than %{max} characters
api.organizations.errors.display_name_to.context: Returned when the organization display name exceeds the length limit

api.organizations.errors.description_too.text: Description must be less than %{max} characters
api.organizations.errors.description_too.context: Returned when the organization description exceeds the length limit

api.organizations.errors.contact_email_e.text: An organization with this contact email already exists
api.organizations.errors.contact_email_e.context: Returned when the contact email is already used by another organization

api.organizations.errors.creation_in_pro.text: Organization creation in progress. Please try again.
api.organizations.errors.creation_in_pro.context: Returned when the per-customer creation lock cannot be acquired

api.organizations.errors.organization_li.text: Organization limit reached. Upgrade your plan to create more organizations.
api.organizations.errors.organization_li.context: Returned when the customer has hit their plan's organization quota

api.organizations.invitations.errors.inv.context: Returned when an invitation token doesn't match a known invitation

api.organizations.invitations.errors.ema.context: Returned when creating an invitation without an email

api.organizations.invitations.errors.inv.context: Returned when the invitation email fails address validation

api.organizations.invitations.errors.inv.text: Role must be member or admin
api.organizations.invitations.errors.inv.context: Returned when the requested role is not one of the allowed values

api.organizations.invitations.errors.can.context: Returned when an invitation tries to grant owner role

api.organizations.invitations.errors.use.text: User is already a member of this organization
api.organizations.invitations.errors.use.context: Returned when the invitee already belongs to the organization

api.organizations.invitations.errors.inv.text: Invitation already pending for this email
api.organizations.invitations.errors.inv.context: Returned when a pending invitation already exists for the email

api.organizations.invitations.errors.mem.text: Member limit reached. Upgrade your plan to invite more members.
api.organizations.invitations.errors.mem.context: Returned when the organization has hit its plan's member quota

api.organizations.invitations.errors.res.context: Returned when attempting to resend a non-pending invitation
Returned when an invitation has been resent the maximum number of times

api.organizations.invitations.errors.rev.context: Returned when attempting to revoke a non-pending invitation

api.organizations.members.errors.member_.context: Returned when a member extid cannot be resolved

api.organizations.members.errors.member_.text: Member not found in this organization
api.organizations.members.errors.member_.context: Returned when a member exists but is not a member of the organization
Returned when a member's membership status is not active

api.organizations.members.errors.invalid.text: Invalid role. Must be one of: %{roles}
api.organizations.members.errors.invalid.context: Returned when the requested role value is not one of the allowed roles

api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.text: Cannot change owner role. Use ownership transfer instead.
api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.context: Returned when attempting to change the role of an owner

api.organizations.members.errors.member_.context: Returned when a role update is a no-op

api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.text: Cannot promote to owner. Use ownership transfer instead.
api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.context: Returned when attempting to promote a member to owner

api.organizations.members.errors.must_be.text: You must be a member of this organization
api.organizations.members.errors.must_be.context: Returned when an actor without membership attempts a member-only action

api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.text: Cannot remove organization owner. Transfer ownership first.
api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.context: Returned when attempting to remove the owner of an organization

api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.text: Cannot remove yourself. Use leave organization instead.
api.organizations.members.errors.cannot_.context: Returned when an actor attempts to remove themselves

api.organizations.members.errors.admin_c.text: Admins cannot remove other admins. Only owners can.
api.organizations.members.errors.admin_c.context: Returned when an admin attempts to remove another admin

api.organizations.members.errors.no_perm.text: You do not have permission to remove members
api.organizations.members.errors.no_perm.context: Returned when an actor without admin/owner role attempts to remove a member
